assertions.title: PurchasingService decomposed into focused PO/GRN/returns services under 500 lines

steps.expected: Focused purchasing services remain under 500 lines and facade is reduced
steps.observed: wc -l reported PurchaseOrderService=356, GoodsReceiptService=457, PurchaseReturnService=386, PurchasingService=258

steps.expected: Facade-level goods receipt and return safeguards continue to pass

evidence.observedOutput: All targeted decomposition-related suites passed with BUILD SUCCESS and zero failures.
evidence.network: localhost:8081 unavailable in this run; used Maven/API-contract test fallback

assertions.title: Purchase order lifecycle with GRN-driven transitions

steps.action: Verify canonical PO transition matrix in service and tests
steps.observed: PurchaseOrderServiceTransitionMatrixTest validates full happy path and invalid-transition rejections; PurchaseOrderServiceTest validates approve/void/close/timeline behavior

steps.expected: GRN creation transitions APPROVED->PARTIALLY_RECEIVED/FULLY_RECEIVED depending on remaining quantities
steps.observed: PurchasingServiceGoodsReceiptTest asserts purchaseOrder status updates to PARTIALLY_RECEIVED after partial receipt

steps.action: Verify invoice completion path to close
steps.expected: Invoice engine transitions FULLY_RECEIVED->INVOICED and closes when all GRNs invoiced
steps.observed: PurchaseInvoiceEngineLifecycleTest passed; asserts transitions INVOICED then CLOSED when all GRNs invoiced

evidence.observedOutput: All lifecycle-focused suites passed (PurchaseOrder* + PurchasingServiceGoodsReceiptTest + PurchaseInvoiceEngineLifecycleTest) with zero failures.
evidence.network: No live app endpoint available; assertion validated through service/controller and truth-suite evidence

assertions.title: Purchase returns reduce outstanding, reverse inventory, post corrective journal, cannot exceed outstanding

steps.expected: Return flow posts corrective journal, updates stock/movements, enforces outstanding and idempotency guards
steps.observed: PurchasingServiceTest and PurchaseReturnIdempotencyRegressionIT pass for return flows; over-outstanding path asserts ErrorCode.RETURN_EXCEEDS_OUTSTANDING

steps.action: Verify implementation links return to accounting and inventory
steps.expected: Return posts accounting entry, deducts stock, saves movements, and applies outstanding allocation

evidence.observedOutput: PurchasingServiceTest includes recordPurchaseReturn_amountExceedsOutstanding_throws with ErrorCode.RETURN_EXCEEDS_OUTSTANDING; PurchaseReturnIdempotencyRegressionIT passed 3/3 tests with replay and status checks.
evidence.network: API runtime unavailable; used regression/integration test user surface and source linkage evidence

frictions.description: Task subagent spawning failed for user-testing-flow-validator due mission model alias error.
frictions.resolution: Fallback to in-session validation by primary validator using the same assertion scope.

frictions.description: Live app surface at localhost:8081 was unavailable and Docker DB could not bind host 5432.
frictions.resolution: Validated with targeted Maven/API-contract tests and truthsuite evidence per Flow Validator Guidance: api fallback.

summary: Validated purchasing core assertions with targeted unit/truthsuite/regression evidence under API fallback mode. All assigned assertions (VAL-PURCH-001, VAL-PURCH-003, VAL-PURCH-005) passed with concrete decomposition, lifecycle, and return/accounting protections verified.
